schemes.title: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maandhan (PM-SYM)
schemes.description: Unorganised workers contribute small amounts to receive ₹3,000 monthly pension after age 60.

schemes.title: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
schemes.description: Voluntary pension scheme offering ₹1,000–₹5,000 monthly pension depending on contributions.

schemes.title: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
schemes.description: Monthly pension for senior citizens below poverty line.

schemes.title: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (IGNWPS)
schemes.description: Monthly pension for widows aged 40–79 years.

schemes.title: National Pension System (NPS)
schemes.description: Retirement savings scheme with tax benefits for all citizens.
